name: PublishDrive
description: PublishDrive publisher API for book distribution, metadata updates, store availability, sales, and royalty reporting. API access is partner/sales-gated; endpoint shapes may vary by account contract.

credential_fields.name: token
credential_fields.label: API token
credential_fields.description: PublishDrive API token. API access may need to be enabled by PublishDrive support.

tools.name: list_books
tools.description: List books in the PublishDrive account.

limit.description: Maximum page size; PublishDrive may cap this.

status.description: Optional provider status filter, for example draft, pending, published, rejected.

tools.name: get_book
tools.description: Fetch one PublishDrive book by provider book ID.

tools.name: create_book
tools.description: Create/upload a book package. The body should follow the PublishDrive contract enabled for the account.

body.description: PublishDrive book payload including metadata, contributors, prices, territories, ebook/audiobook/cover asset URLs, and distribution settings.

tools.name: update_book
tools.description: Update PublishDrive metadata or distribution settings for a book.

tools.name: list_stores
tools.description: List distribution stores/retailers available to the PublishDrive account.

tools.name: get_sales
tools.description: Fetch PublishDrive sales reports for a date range.

tools.name: get_royalties
tools.description: Fetch PublishDrive royalty reports for a date range.
